message:
feat(dcg): add database-backed statistics service with trends and time series

- Create dcg-stats.service.ts with full database queries for statistics
- Add overview stats: total blocks, 24h/7d/30d counts, false positive rate
- Add trend calculations comparing current vs previous periods
- Add pattern stats: top blocked patterns, top agents
- Add time series data for charts (7 and 30 day views)
- Update getStats() to use database queries while preserving in-memory pack/severity data
- Add new endpoints: /dcg/stats/full, /dcg/stats/overview, /dcg/stats/trends

Closes flywheel_gateway-r9y

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
